criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: The level of user interaction and engagement with the app, measured by metrics such as daily active users (DAU), monthly active users (MAU), and session duration.
criteria.sources: App analytics platforms, app store metrics

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent and effectiveness of AI integration in the app, including features like chatbots, recommendation engines, and personalization.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, expert analysis

criteria.name: User Reviews and Ratings
criteria.description: The average rating and sentiment of user reviews on app stores, reflecting user satisfaction and feedback.
criteria.sources: App store listings, review aggregation sites

criteria.name: Innovation and Uniqueness
criteria.description: The app's uniqueness and innovation in terms of features, design, and user experience compared to other apps in the category.
criteria.sources: Expert reviews, tech blogs, app descriptions

criteria.name: Privacy and Security
criteria.description: The app's measures to ensure user data privacy and security, including encryption, secure data storage, and transparent privacy policies.
criteria.sources: App permissions, privacy policies, security audits
